info.title: E-Commerce API
info.description: API Documentation for the E-Commerce platform.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all available add-ons.
Retrieve all addresses for the authenticated user.

post.description: Add a new delivery address for the user.

delete.description: Delete a specific address belonging to the user.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all add-ons for the admin panel.

put.description: Update the details of an add-on (Admin only).

get.description: Retrieve a list of all categories.

post.description: Add a new category with an optional image.

delete.description: Delete a category from the database.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all delivery zones for the admin panel.

post.description: Create a new delivery zone (Admin only).

put.description: Update the details of a delivery zone (Admin only).

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all orders.

put.description: Update the status of an existing order.

status.description: New status (e.g. pending, confirmed, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled)

post.description: Add a new product with an optional image.

delete.description: Delete a product from the database.
Delete a subcategory from the database.

get.description: Retrieve the current user's cart and its items.

post.description: Add a new product to the user's cart.

put.description: Update the quantity of an existing item in the cart.

delete.description: Remove a specific item from the user's cart.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all categories including their subcategories.
Retrieve details of a category by its ID.
Retrieve a list of all available delivery zones.
Retrieve all orders for the authenticated user.

post.description: Place an order using the items currently in the user's cart.

get.description: Retrieve the details of a specific order.
Retrieve a list of all products, optionally filtered.
Retrieve details of a product by its ID.
Retrieve a list of subcategories belonging to a specific category.

post.description: Authenticate a user and create a session.
Create a new user account and authenticate them.
Send a password reset link to the given email address.

200.description: Reset link sent successfully (JSON) or 302 Redirect (Web)

post.description: Reset the user password using a token.

200.description: Password has been successfully reset (JSON) or 302 Redirect (Web)
